task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Toyota Camry (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $28700.00 and wholesale is $21596.00. Product features: Mid-size sedan with 203-hp engine and 8-speed automatic transmission. Reference: https://www.toyota.com/camry/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Toyota Camry. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Toyota Camry. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
